resources.string: Opening the live two-player network duel and preparing your command deck.
The arena server is waking up... this can take 50+ seconds on first load.
When the page opens, create a room or enter the same room code as your opponent to jump straight into the duel.
Stable Wi-Fi or 4G/5G helps room reconnects. Swipe from the screen edge anytime to reveal Android system bars.
If the live site opens in your browser, tapping Retry Match should bring you back into the game shell here.
Reconnect the device first, then retry. If needed, open the site in your browser to confirm the network is stable.
The device could not verify the secure connection. Retry in a moment, or open the site in your browser to confirm the certificate path.
Android\'s web renderer was interrupted. Retrying the session usually restores the live game cleanly.
Use this debug-only panel to switch the Android wrapper between the public deployment, emulator localhost, or a LAN URL from your PC.
Emulator preset: http://10.0.2.2:8000/ . Real phone preset: replace the LAN template with your PC\'s Wi-Fi IP.
Enter a full http:// or https:// game URL before saving.
